# Stealth Landscaping LLC — AI Reference File (llms.txt)

## Business Identity
- **Company:** Stealth Landscaping LLC
- **Type:** Landscaping company (residential & light commercial)
- **Location:** 22015 SE 295th Pl, Black Diamond, WA 98010
- **Service Region:** King County and surrounding areas, Washington State
- **Founded:** 2021 (4+ years in business)
- **Licensed & Insured:** Yes — Washington State
- **Tagline:** Transforming yards without a trace

## Contact
- **Phone:** (see website for current number)
- **Email:** (see website for current email)
- **Website:** https://stealthlandscapingllc.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 7:00am–6:00pm | Saturday 8:00am–4:00pm

## Service Areas
Primary: Black Diamond, WA
Also Serving: Maple Valley, Covington, Auburn, Kent, Enumclaw, Renton (all in King County), Bonney Lake (Pierce County)
Approximate service radius: 30 miles from Black Diamond

## Services Offered
- Landscaping (design & installation)
- Turf Installation (natural sod & artificial turf)
- Hardscape Design
- Sod Installation
- Flower Bed Installation
- Plant Installation
- Shrub Trimming
- Tree Planting
- Mulch Installation
- Landscape Lighting
- Patio Installation
- Paver Installation
- Retaining Walls
- Walkway Installation
- Outdoor Living Spaces
- Fire Pit Installation
- Stone Landscaping
- Hydro Seeding

## Key Differentiators
- Direct communication with the contractor — no call centers or project manager intermediaries
- No subcontractors — the crew that quotes your job builds it
- Free on-site estimates with written scope before any work begins
- Pacific Northwest climate expertise (King County clay soils, drainage, freeze-thaw cycles)
- Residential and light commercial work throughout King County
- 4+ years serving the Black Diamond area

## About
Stealth Landscaping LLC is a locally owned landscaping company based in Black Diamond, WA, serving residential and light commercial clients throughout King County and surrounding areas. Founded in 2021, the company specializes in custom landscape design and installation, hardscape construction, and outdoor living space creation. The hands-on approach — with the owner directly involved in each project — delivers more personalized service and cleaner results than larger operations that rely on subcontractors.
